CORIOLIS_AIO.Unified.Title: Coriolis AIO Generator
CORIOLIS_AIO.Dialog.Name: Name
CORIOLIS_AIO.Encounter.PartyXPHint: Average experience points spent per player. Scales enemy stats.
CORIOLIS_AIO.Ship.Name: Ship Name
CORIOLIS_AIO.Ship.IncludeProblemHint: Adds a flavorful quirk or ongoing issue to the ship.
CORIOLIS_AIO.ShipEncounter.Title: Ship Encounter
CORIOLIS_AIO.Party.Title: Party Generator
CORIOLIS_AIO.Party.AllowDuplicatesHint: If unchecked, each character will have a unique concept.
CORIOLIS_AIO.NPC.Title: Quick NPC
CORIOLIS_AIO.NPC.CreateActorHint: If unchecked, creates a journal entry with NPC description instead.
CORIOLIS_AIO.ShipEncounter.GenerateBoard: Auto-generates a linked personal combat encounter for boarding actions.
CORIOLIS_AIO.Encounter.GenerateEnemyShip: Auto-generates a linked ship encounter if the template has one.
CORIOLIS_AIO.Mission.Title: Mission Generator
CORIOLIS_AIO.Mission.GeneratePatronHint: Creates an NPC actor for the mission's patron.
CORIOLIS_AIO.Mission.GenerateAntagonistH: Creates an NPC actor for the mission's antagonist.
CORIOLIS_AIO.NPC.MysticPowers: Include mystic powers for qualifying archetypes
CORIOLIS_AIO.NPC.MysticPowersHint: Mystic archetypes will receive 1-2 random mystic power talents drawn from the compendium.
CORIOLIS_AIO.AINPC.Title: AI NPC Generator
CORIOLIS_AIO.AINPC.PromptPlaceholder: e.g. A grizzled Dabaran smuggler who secretly works for the Draconites, armed with a Vulcan pistol and cybernetic eye...
CORIOLIS_AIO.AINPC.PromptHint: Describe the NPC you want. The AI will generate a complete actor with stats, gear, talents, and background. Requires an API key configured in module settings.
CORIOLIS_AIO.AINPC.NoApiKey: No API key configured. Set it in Module Settings → Coriolis AIO Generator.
CORIOLIS_AIO.AINPC.Generating: Generating NPC with AI — this may take a few seconds...
CORIOLIS_AIO.Settings.ProviderHint: Which LLM to use. Gemini offers a generous free tier. OpenRouter has free models. Anthropic is paid but highest quality.
CORIOLIS_AIO.Settings.ApiKeyHint: API key for the selected provider. Gemini: aistudio.google.com/apikey — OpenRouter: openrouter.ai/keys — Anthropic: console.anthropic.com
CORIOLIS_AIO.Error.GenerationFailed: Generation failed. Check the console for details.
